posts.author: pacarvalho (Pedro Carvalho)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

A few of my team members cannot update their board view to the new design. As part of the team has this new design the ones with the older one cannot have access to some features on tables, specifically the access to subitens.

Do you know how we can update all of my team accounts to the new board view?

Thank you so much!!
